name: Reporter wool handbag
description: Really Good Condition Hermes Cloth Messenger Clutch Purse Bag. The zipper on this bag works perfectly. The outside of the bag is in really good shape, no major rips or tears at all to mention on the outside, just minor signs of use. The inside of the bag is in really good shape as well with no rips or tears at all on the lining, there are minor signs of use on the lining but nothing detrimental. The bag is Trimmed in Brown Leather Giving this Bag from the Hermes Fashion House a really nice look! Please make sure to see all of the photos for the condition of this item. If you have any questions at all please feel free to ask! Will ship out by the next business day! *Please note this item does include a shoulder strap that is adjustable and is in good shape but I BELIEVE that it is a replacement strap and not the original strap from Hermes, either way it still is a really nice looking bag!*
